ab: musa balayi i kasiyuk kung pila su aw?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: ini kung aras pila uziy ki!
yamngiya kung maras su pila la,musa balayi i kasiyuk kung pila su aw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: laxiy ,tiku kinsyuk su su sarali na pilaini mu naga ini su bi’i na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: musa balayi i kasiyuk kung tikay latan su aw?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: aw, haliy magan nanak.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: musa balayi kasiyuk kung biru su aw?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: wayan mu pakasiyu ki Lawa la.
en: B: I lent it to Lawa.

ab: pakasyuki kung na lilinsa’ su wa?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: aw, sikila ga wahiy mayi lawziy sasan ki.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: niyan mawalax la, ini kung aras su tabakuy, kasiyuki kung tikay tabakuy aw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: utux balay ku tabakuy mu, pagalagaw ta amamuk ki!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: biru hani ga kinsiyuk misu su wayan ka sa’utux, pabazih misu la.
ch: A+:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: yahani ku pinkasiyuk su kung na biru, ba’anay misu la.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: atu na samawgan su matauax nanu biru na ga, kayan kung lawziy ki.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: kanuwan ku awsa mu pabzih pila su la?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: nuway iri’, kiyan ku luwan su laga pakyalay ta kiya la.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: kanuwan ku ’uwah su pabazih pila mu la?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: wahay mu mayi sasan ku pila su.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: kanuwan ku ’uwah su pabazih biru mu la?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ayat misu wayan sabay su sahaysa ku biru su la pi?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: ti ku babiru’ hani ga pinkasyuk su ni Masaw pi?
en: A: Did Masaw lend you this pen?

ab: hu, kinsiyuk mu ki hiya su sawni.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kinsuyuk su ki Maray ku inpit hani pi?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Maray?

ab: ayat ,banaziy ni yaya mu.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: ungat ku Tamuyux la,usa kasyuk tamuyux ki Sayun.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Sayun.

ab: aw, halay mu kasiyuk.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: hali kamayan i Puyap maha psugi pila mu la.
en: B: Go tell Puyap to give me my money back.

ab: haliy kamayan i Puyap maha pasiyugi ku pila mu.
en: B: Go tell Puyap to give me my money back.

ab: pisa ku kuhay niya pila ki isu pi?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
